title: Homes API
description: An API for my mod Homes and others mods acting as an extension for Homes mod
body:
This mod does not do anything by itself, it is used with the Homes mod and other future mod that will be extensions to the Homes mod. This mod is required as dependency by my other mod "Homes" since version 1.0.5

Please check my new mod, an alternative to this one: https://modrinth.com/mod/manymanycommands
